description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4tc-ubuntu that runs daily at midnight UTC, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should run a job on an ubuntu-24.04 environment with specific environment variables, checking out the repository with submodules and a fetch depth of 0, using ccache, building with a script, and running tests with ctest, but only on pull requests labeled with p4tc or on scheduled runs.
